slide_title: What is OptiSweep / Traditional vs Fortna’s Solution
visible_text: • FORTNA developed an automated Consolidated Bagging (ACB) solution utilizing AGVs and tippers to create a flexible and
• In a traditional small sort system. Operators are assigned sections of destinations (20-25) on a sorter. Parcels divert down
the destination and fall into a bag. When the bag becomes full an operator closes the destination, prints a label, applies the
label to the bag, zips up the bag, places the bag on a takeaway belt, and then reopens the chute.
• In a Belted ACB solution when a destination is full the bin is dropped on a takeaway conveyor that conveys the packages
as a slug that go down a chute into a bag station where the user applies a label, zips up the bag and places it on a
• Fortna wanted a more modular and adaptive design that would need little modification to existing sorters. By utilizing AGVs
and tippers we can scale solutions and tailor maps to existing building sorters.
